candidate_element_mismatch_rule: retain every frozen candidate without changing its CIF; record when parsed CIF elements are not a subset of the front-end system key
converter_order: pymatgen symmetry-normalized CIF after strict round-trip validation
pymatgen P1 explicit-site CIF after strict round-trip validation
normalized_cif_serialization: pymatgen CifWriter at 8 significant figures with max_len=2048 so each atom-site loop record remains on one line for xrayutilities

round_trip_requirements.structure_matcher: must pass without scaling or supercells

selection_dependence: none; identical rules for every frozen candidate
source_parse_fallback: structured removal of atom-loop rows without species/coordinates and invalid attached-hydrogen metadata only
space_group_rule: use valid source-declared IT number; otherwise computed number at symprec=0.1 angstrom and angle_tolerance=5 degrees
